---
title: "Course 2: Applications of TinyML"
---

```{=html}
<!-- Base URL for all TinyML courseware PDFs — change here if the source repo moves -->
<script>
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {
  var BASE = 'https://github.com/tinyMLx/courseware/raw/master/edX';
  document.querySelectorAll('a[data-tinyml]').forEach(function(a) {
    a.href = BASE + '/' + a.getAttribute('data-tinyml');
    a.target = '_blank';
  });
});
</script>

<div style="margin-bottom: 1.5rem;">
  <a href="tinyml.html" class="btn-outline">← Back to TinyML Overview</a>
  <a href="https://github.com/harvard-edge/cs249r_book/releases/download/slides-latest/MLSysBook-TinyML-All.zip" class="btn-accent" target="_blank">Download All (ZIP)</a>
  <a href="https://www.edx.org/professional-certificate/harvardx-tiny-machine-learning" class="btn-outline" target="_blank">edX Course</a>
</div>

<!-- ================================================================ -->
<!-- CHAPTER 3: Applications of TinyML -->
<!-- ================================================================ -->
<div class="module-card">
  <span class="tag">Chapter 3 · Course 2</span>
  <h3>Applications of TinyML</h3>
  <p class="module-desc">Real-world TinyML applications: keyword spotting, visual wake words, and anomaly detection. Covers TensorFlow Lite, quantization, data engineering, and responsible AI development.</p>
  <span class="companion">Textbook companion: <a href="https://mlsysbook.ai/vol1/">Vol I Ch 10–12</a> · <a href="https://mlsysbook.ai/kits/">Hardware Kits</a></span>
</div>

<div class="module-card">
  <h4 class="section-header-sm">§3.1 Welcome to Applications of TinyML</h4>
  <table class="section-list">
    <thead>
      <tr><th>Topic</th><th class="dl-col">Type</th></tr>
    </thead>
    <tbody>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="readings/3-1-1.pdf">Who's Who in TinyML2?!</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-reading">Reading</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="slides/3-1-3.pdf">Welcome to TinyML Applications</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-slides">Slides</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="slides/3-1-4.pdf">Building Blocks (from Course 1)</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-slides">Slides</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="slides/3-1-6.pdf">What You'll Learn in This Course</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-slides">Slides</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="readings/3-1-7.pdf">What Resources are Needed for this Course</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-reading">Reading</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="slides/3-1-8.pdf">Preview of TinyML Applications</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-slides">Slides</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="readings/3-1-9.pdf">The Role of Sensors in TinyML Applications</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-reading">Reading</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="readings/3-1-12.pdf">The Kit for Course 3</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-reading">Reading</span></td>
      </tr>
    </tbody>
  </table>
</div>

<div class="module-card">
  <h4 class="section-header-sm">§3.2 AI Lifecycle and ML Workflow</h4>
  <table class="section-list">
    <thead>
      <tr><th>Topic</th><th class="dl-col">Type</th></tr>
    </thead>
    <tbody>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="slides/3-2-1.pdf">ML Lifecycle Part 1</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-slides">Slides</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="readings/3-2-3.pdf">ML Lifecycle Part 2</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-reading">Reading</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="slides/3-2-4.pdf">ML Workflow Part 1</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-slides">Slides</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="readings/3-2-5.pdf">ML Workflow Part 2</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-reading">Reading</span></td>
      </tr>
    </tbody>
  </table>
</div>

<div class="module-card">
  <h4 class="section-header-sm">§3.3 ML on Mobile and Edge IoT Devices (Part 1)</h4>
  <table class="section-list">
    <thead>
      <tr><th>Topic</th><th class="dl-col">Type</th></tr>
    </thead>
    <tbody>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="readings/3-3-1.pdf">TensorFlow: Where We Left Off</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-reading">Reading</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="slides/3-3-2.pdf">Introduction to TensorFlow Lite</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-slides">Slides</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td><a href="https://colab.research.google.com/github/tinyMLx/colabs/blob/master/3-3-4-TFLiteConverter.ipynb" target="_blank">Using the TFLite Converter in Colab</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-colab">Colab</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="readings/3-3-5.pdf">How to use TFLite Models</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-reading">Reading</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td><a href="https://colab.research.google.com/github/tinyMLx/colabs/blob/master/3-3-7-RunningTFLiteModels.ipynb" target="_blank">Running Models with TFLite in Colab</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-colab">Colab</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="slides/3-3-9.pdf">TFLite Optimizations and Quantization</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-slides">Slides</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td><a href="https://colab.research.google.com/github/tinyMLx/colabs/blob/master/3-3-10-TFLiteOptimizations.ipynb" target="_blank">TFLite Optimizations and Quantization in Colab</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-colab">Colab</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="slides/3-3-11.pdf">Quantization Aware Training</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-slides">Slides</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td><a href="https://colab.research.google.com/github/tensorflow/model-optimization/blob/master/tensorflow_model_optimization/g3doc/guide/quantization/training_example.ipynb" target="_blank">Quantization Aware Training Colab</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-colab">Colab</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td><a href="https://colab.research.google.com/github/tinyMLx/colabs/blob/master/3-3-14-Assignment.ipynb" target="_blank">Assignment: Quantization in TFLite</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-colab">Colab</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="other/3-3-15.pdf">Assignment Solution</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-reading">Reading</span></td>
      </tr>
    </tbody>
  </table>
</div>

<div class="module-card">
  <h4 class="section-header-sm">§3.4 ML on Mobile and Edge IoT Devices (Part 2)</h4>
  <table class="section-list">
    <thead>
      <tr><th>Topic</th><th class="dl-col">Type</th></tr>
    </thead>
    <tbody>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="readings/3-4-1.pdf">Why are 8-Bits Enough for ML?</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-reading">Reading</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="slides/3-4-2.pdf">Post Training Quantization (PTQ)</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-slides">Slides</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td><a href="https://colab.research.google.com/github/tinyMLx/colabs/blob/master/3-4-3-PTQ.ipynb" target="_blank">PTQ Weight Distribution Colab</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-colab">Colab</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="slides/3-4-4.pdf">Quantization Aware Training (QAT)</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-slides">Slides</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="slides/3-4-6.pdf">Inference Engine: TF vs. TFLite</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-slides">Slides</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="readings/3-4-7.pdf">Conversion and Deployment</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-reading">Reading</span></td>
      </tr>
    </tbody>
  </table>
</div>

<div class="module-card">
  <h4 class="section-header-sm">§3.5 Keyword Spotting</h4>
  <table class="section-list">
    <thead>
      <tr><th>Topic</th><th class="dl-col">Type</th></tr>
    </thead>
    <tbody>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="slides/3-5-1.pdf">Introduction to Keyword Spotting (KWS)</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-slides">Slides</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="slides/3-5-3.pdf">Keyword Spotting Challenges/Constraints</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-slides">Slides</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="readings/3-5-5.pdf">Keyword Spotting Application Architecture Overview</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-reading">Reading</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="slides/3-5-6.pdf">Keyword Spotting Datasets</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-slides">Slides</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="readings/3-5-7.pdf">Keyword Spotting Dataset Creation</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-reading">Reading</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="slides/3-5-8.pdf">Keyword Spotting Data Collection / Pre-Processing</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-slides">Slides</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="readings/3-5-9.pdf">Spectrograms and MFCCs</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-reading">Reading</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td><a href="https://colab.research.google.com/github/tinyMLx/colabs/blob/master/3-5-10-SpectrogramsMFCCs.ipynb" target="_blank">Spectrograms and MFCCs in Colab</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-colab">Colab</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="slides/3-5-11.pdf">A Keyword Spotting Model</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-slides">Slides</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td><a href="https://colab.research.google.com/github/tinyMLx/colabs/blob/master/3-5-13-PretrainedModel.ipynb" target="_blank">Keyword Spotting in Colab</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-colab">Colab</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="slides/3-5-15.pdf">Intro to Training in Colab</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-slides">Slides</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="readings/3-5-16.pdf">Training in Colab</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-reading">Reading</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="readings/3-5-17.pdf">Monitoring Training in Colab</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-reading">Reading</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td><a href="https://colab.research.google.com/github/tinyMLx/colabs/blob/master/3-5-18-TrainingKeywordSpotting.ipynb" target="_blank">Assignment: Training your own KWS Model</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-colab">Colab</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="other/3-5-19.pdf">Assignment Solution</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-reading">Reading</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="slides/3-5-20.pdf">KWS Metrics</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-slides">Slides</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="slides/3-5-22.pdf">Streaming Audio</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-slides">Slides</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="slides/3-5-23.pdf">Cascade Architectures</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-slides">Slides</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="readings/3-5-24.pdf">Keyword Spotting in the Big Picture</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-reading">Reading</span></td>
      </tr>
    </tbody>
  </table>
</div>

<div class="module-card">
  <h4 class="section-header-sm">§3.6 Data Engineering for TinyML Applications</h4>
  <table class="section-list">
    <thead>
      <tr><th>Topic</th><th class="dl-col">Type</th></tr>
    </thead>
    <tbody>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="readings/3-6-1.pdf">Introduction to Data Engineering</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-reading">Reading</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="slides/3-6-2.pdf">What's Data Engineering and Why It's Important</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-slides">Slides</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="slides/3-6-4.pdf">Dataset Standards: Speech Commands</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-slides">Slides</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="readings/3-6-5.pdf">Speech Commands Paper</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-reading">Reading</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="slides/3-6-7.pdf">Crowdsourcing Data for the Long Tail</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-slides">Slides</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="other/3-6-8.pdf">Giving back to the Open Source Community</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-reading">Reading</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="slides/3-6-9.pdf">Reusing and Adapting Existing Datasets</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-slides">Slides</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="slides/3-6-11.pdf">Responsible Data Collection</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-slides">Slides</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="readings/3-6-13.pdf">Section Summary</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-reading">Reading</span></td>
      </tr>
    </tbody>
  </table>
</div>

<div class="module-card">
  <h4 class="section-header-sm">§3.7 Visual Wake Words</h4>
  <table class="section-list">
    <thead>
      <tr><th>Topic</th><th class="dl-col">Type</th></tr>
    </thead>
    <tbody>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="readings/3-7-1.pdf">Introduction to Visual Wake Words (VWW) Application</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-reading">Reading</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="slides/3-7-2.pdf">What are Visual Wake Words (VWW)?</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-slides">Slides</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="slides/3-7-4.pdf">Visual Wake Words Challenges</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-slides">Slides</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="slides/3-7-5.pdf">Visual Wake Words Dataset</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-slides">Slides</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="readings/3-7-6.pdf">Data Privacy with Images</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-reading">Reading</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="slides/3-7-8.pdf">Neural Network Architectures for VWW</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-slides">Slides</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="readings/3-7-9.pdf">The Math Behind MobileNets Efficient Computation</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-reading">Reading</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="slides/3-7-10.pdf">Transfer Learning for VWW</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-slides">Slides</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td><a href="https://colab.research.google.com/github/tinyMLx/colabs/blob/master/3-7-11-Assignment.ipynb" target="_blank">Assignment: Transfer Learning in Colab</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-colab">Colab</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="other/3-7-12.pdf">Assignment Solution</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-reading">Reading</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="readings/3-7-13.pdf">Common Myths and Pitfalls about Transfer Learning</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-reading">Reading</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="slides/3-7-15.pdf">Metrics for VWW</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-slides">Slides</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="readings/3-7-16.pdf">Section Summary</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-reading">Reading</span></td>
      </tr>
    </tbody>
  </table>
</div>

<div class="module-card">
  <h4 class="section-header-sm">§3.8 Anomaly Detection</h4>
  <table class="section-list">
    <thead>
      <tr><th>Topic</th><th class="dl-col">Type</th></tr>
    </thead>
    <tbody>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="readings/3-8-1.pdf">Introduction to Anomaly Detection</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-reading">Reading</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="slides/3-8-2.pdf">What Is Anomaly Detection</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-slides">Slides</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="slides/3-8-4.pdf">Anomaly Detection in Industry</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-slides">Slides</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="readings/3-8-5.pdf">Industry 4.0 and TinyML</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-reading">Reading</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="slides/3-8-6.pdf">Anomaly Detection Datasets</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-slides">Slides</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="readings/3-8-7.pdf">MIMII Dataset</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-reading">Reading</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="readings/3-8-8.pdf">Real vs. Synthetic Data</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-reading">Reading</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td><a href="https://colab.research.google.com/github/tinyMLx/colabs/blob/master/3-8-9-K-means.ipynb" target="_blank">Unsupervised Learning: K-Means in Colab</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-colab">Colab</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="slides/3-8-11.pdf">Unsupervised Learning with Autoencoders</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-slides">Slides</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="readings/3-8-12.pdf">Autoencoder Model Architecture</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-reading">Reading</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td><a href="https://colab.research.google.com/github/tinyMLx/colabs/blob/master/3-8-13-Autoencoders.ipynb" target="_blank">Training and Metrics for Autoencoders in Colab</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-colab">Colab</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td><a href="https://colab.research.google.com/github/tinyMLx/colabs/blob/master/3-8-16-Assignment.ipynb" target="_blank">Assignment: Training an Anomaly Detection Model</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-colab">Colab</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="other/3-8-16.pdf">Assignment Solution</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-reading">Reading</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="readings/3-8-18.pdf">Section Summary</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-reading">Reading</span></td>
      </tr>
    </tbody>
  </table>
</div>

<div class="module-card">
  <h4 class="section-header-sm">§3.9 Responsible AI Development</h4>
  <table class="section-list">
    <thead>
      <tr><th>Topic</th><th class="dl-col">Type</th></tr>
    </thead>
    <tbody>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="slides/3-9-1.pdf">Data Collection</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-slides">Slides</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="readings/3-9-2.pdf">The Many Faces of Bias in ML</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-reading">Reading</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="slides/3-9-3.pdf">Biased Datasets</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-slides">Slides</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="other/3-9-5.pdf">Bias</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-reading">Reading</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="slides/3-9-6.pdf">Fairness</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-slides">Slides</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td><a href="https://colab.research.google.com/github/tinyMLx/colabs/blob/master/3-10-7-WIT.ipynb" target="_blank">Google's What-If Tool in Colab</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-colab">Colab</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="other/3-9-8.pdf">Fairness</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-reading">Reading</span></td>
      </tr>
    </tbody>
  </table>
</div>

<div class="module-card">
  <h4 class="section-header-sm">§3.10 Chapter Summary</h4>
  <table class="section-list">
    <thead>
      <tr><th>Topic</th><th class="dl-col">Type</th></tr>
    </thead>
    <tbody>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="slides/3-10-1.pdf">Chapter Summary</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-slides">Slides</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="readings/3-10-3.pdf">Kit for Course 3</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-reading">Reading</span></td>
      </tr>
    </tbody>
  </table>
</div>
```

::: {.callout-note}
These materials were originally developed for the [HarvardX Professional Certificate in Tiny Machine Learning](https://www.edx.org/professional-certificate/harvardx-tiny-machine-learning) on edX. See the [original curriculum](tinyml/README-edx-original.md) for the full item-by-item breakdown including forum prompts and quizzes not listed above.
:::
